docs.title: Architecture sync 2026-05-05
docs.content:
Architecture Sync 2026-05-05

Participants: alice, bob, carol

alice: We're splitting the monolith. The wiki synthesis code moves from prbe-knowledge into a new prbe-wiki repo.
bob: Makes sense. prbe-knowledge is getting big.
carol: Timeline?
alice: Target is end of Q2. prbe-wiki will have its own Fly app.

docs.title: ARCH-5: Extract wiki synthesis into prbe-wiki repo
docs.content:
Issue ARCH-5: Extract wiki synthesis into dedicated prbe-wiki repository
Status: Planned
Description: Move services/wiki/* from prbe-knowledge into a standalone prbe-wiki repo. Deploy as a separate Fly app to allow independent scaling.

expected_edges.note: Meeting notes briefly mention the new prbe-wiki repo as the target for the wiki extraction migration
